content: User request: I need to find out if there's any compensation for my delayed flight AB1234.
Agent called NO tools — responded with text only.

Verifier: FAILED — avg=0.00 std=0.00 | The agent did not explain the airline's compensation policy for delayed flights, which was the core of the pass criteria. Instead, it asked for personal information to assist, which is not what was requested. (score=0.0)
